title: garetcraft SMP
description: Modpack for playing on garetSMP server
body:
Mods that add physics and interesting game mechanics using vanilla mechanics.

Modpack based on Vanilla for playing on garetSMP server. Nice Latvian community build this nice server and update modpack for server.

There is also optimization, increasing the frame rate, optimizing sounds, light and any movements.

The main goal that we are trying to achieve is an interesting game close to reality where everyone will be interested and everyone will find something for themselves.
